simulation_metadata.version: 2.1 — added chemical, geomagnetic, and orbital coupling domains

atmospheric_parameters.al2o3_residence_time_note: Corrected from 30yr; based on meteor smoke particle transport
atmospheric_parameters.coupling_resonance_note: Removed. Proton gyrofrequency ~760 Hz, electron ~1.4 MHz; previous 100 MHz value was incorrect by ~5 orders of magnitude

projected_time_series_note: Revised with 5yr residence time (burden ~6x lower than 30yr model)

chemical_parameters.so2_enhancement_note: Multiplicative increase in gamma when SO2 is adsorbed on Al2O3 surfaces
chemical_parameters.confidence: MEDIUM for catalysis rates, LOW for SAI synergy magnitude

geomagnetic_parameters.confidence: HIGH for field evolution, LOW for EPP-particle coupling

orbital_parameters.note: Natural meteoric Al2O3 (~400 t/yr) >> current satellite Al2O3 (~22 t/yr) but chemically distinct
orbital_parameters.confidence: HIGH for meteoric input, LOW for close-pass scenarios
